stemHtml: Some of the inherent errors in NAVSTAR/GPS signals can be corrected by using a Ground Based Augmentation System (GBAS). The GBAS station…

options.a: checks the position calculated by the received signals against its own position, then sends error signals back to the satellites, which correct the errors.
options.b: transmits error information to each satellite where there is a conflict as regards position.
options.c: is located in an accurately surveyed position and analyses the received signals to provide an error correction.
options.d: will only calculate errors in the signals that are being viewed by the users receiver.
